input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.2.1
            TITLE: insulation material must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.2.1: Insulation material must:
EV.6.2.1 Insulation material must:  
a. Be appropriate for the expected surrounding temperatures 
b. Have a minimum temperature rating of 90°C

final_answer: rule EV.6.2.1: Insulation material must: EV.6.2.1 Insulation material must: a. Be appropriate for the expected surrounding temperatures b. Have a minimum temperature rating of 90°C
